archive_blobs_verified_state_check.name: archive_blobs_verified_state_check
archive_blobs_verified_state_check.value: ("archive_blobs"."storage_state" = 'verified' and "archive_blobs"."verified_at" is not null) or "archive_blobs"."storage_state" in ('quarantined', 'deleted')

blob_origins_kind_consistency_check.name: blob_origins_kind_consistency_check
blob_origins_kind_consistency_check.value: ("blob_origins"."origin_kind" = 'lfs' and "blob_origins"."lfs_oid" is not null and "blob_origins"."git_blob_sha1" is null) or ("blob_origins"."origin_kind" = 'git_blob' and "blob_origins"."git_blob_sha1" is not null and "blob_origins"."lfs_oid" is null) or ("blob_origins"."origin_kind" = 'orphan' and "blob_origins"."lfs_oid" is null and "blob_origins"."git_blob_sha1" is null and "blob_origins"."note" is not null)

file_revisions_page_range_check.name: file_revisions_page_range_check
file_revisions_page_range_check.value: ("file_revisions"."page_start" is null and "file_revisions"."page_end" is null) or ("file_revisions"."page_start" is not null and "file_revisions"."page_end" is not null and "file_revisions"."page_end" >= "file_revisions"."page_start")

file_revisions_review_pair_check.name: file_revisions_review_pair_check
file_revisions_review_pair_check.value: ("file_revisions"."reviewed_by" is null and "file_revisions"."reviewed_at" is null) or ("file_revisions"."reviewed_by" is not null and "file_revisions"."reviewed_at" is not null)

file_revisions_expunged_blob_check.name: file_revisions_expunged_blob_check
file_revisions_expunged_blob_check.value: ("file_revisions"."review_status" = 'expunged' and "file_revisions"."blob_sha256" is null and "file_revisions"."is_current" = 0) or ("file_revisions"."review_status" <> 'expunged' and "file_revisions"."blob_sha256" is not null)

source_files_checkout_pair_check.name: source_files_checkout_pair_check
source_files_checkout_pair_check.value: ("source_files"."checkout_repo_id" is null and "source_files"."checkout_path" is null) or ("source_files"."checkout_repo_id" is not null and "source_files"."checkout_path" is not null)
